{
  "artifact_type": "srx_ace_audit_agent",
  "depth_tier": "D2_PRODUCTION",
  "runtime_target": "Codex",
  "should_block": true,
  "blocked_reason": "Unsafe certainty: raw_intent contains unsupported_roi_claim as chaos input type, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Cannot validate ROI claim without market_lens data source or clear success metrics. Blocking to prevent hallucinated compliance or financial advice. Repair receipt: require explicit market_lens dataset reference, define acceptance criteria as measurable thresholds, and replace urgent language with structured timeline.",
  "compiled_intent": {
    "Objective": "Build an srx_ace_audit_agent for research_agent that validates market_lens data and blocks unsupported ROI claims.",
    "Scope": "Audit agent must process market_lens inputs, flag unsupported_roi_claim patterns, and generate a repair receipt. Excludes financial forecasting or legal compliance.",
    "Constraints": "No hallucinated data. Must reject ambiguous acceptance criteria. Must not output unverified ROI metrics. Must operate within Codex runtime.",
    "Success Criteria": "Agent correctly identifies unsupported_roi_claim in at least 3 test cases. Produces a repair receipt with missing context fields. Blocks execution when certainty < 0.95.",
    "Output Contract": {
      "artifact_type": "srx_ace_audit_agent",
      "depth_tier": "D2_PRODUCTION",
      "runtime_target": "Codex",
      "should_block": true,
      "blocked_reason": "Unsafe certainty: unsupported_roi_claim cannot be validated without market_lens data source. Repair receipt issued.",
      "compiled_intent": "See above"
    }
  }
}
